goal: Move the Play spawn from the old front pore position to the user-requested submarine-side coordinate.
changes: Changed MainCellSwimSpawn source position to Vector3.new(0, 58, -385.691).
Changed spawnLookTarget to Vector3.new(0, 58, 0) so the player faces from the submarine side toward the cell.
Kept MainCellSwimSpawn.CanCollide=false so the spawn pad does not become an invisible obstruction.
Updated validation assertions to treat the submarine-side spawn as the current contract.
validation: Deployed BuildMainCellExperience.lua into Roblox Studio through the legacy bridge.
Ran require(builder).build() and confirmed MainCellSwimSpawn position and look vector.
note: The spawn now matches the requested X/Z and Y=58 swimming height. The live Submarine model's visible bounding box is currently around Y=406, so the submarine mesh itself may need a separate relocation if the visual model should also sit at Y=58.
result: Pressing Play should now spawn the character at the submarine-side water coordinate instead of near the old pore-side floating start.
